title: External sensor/FMIS/EO/model data auto-promotion attempt
targetInvariant: External data is evidence or candidate material until governed promotion; import success is not accepted truth.
attackPattern: A sensor feed, machinery log, FMIS import, EO signal, or model output is written directly into accepted compliance state.
attemptedShortcut: Treating data arrival as accepted assertion/history consequence.

mustAllowIfAny: human review path where OFARM basis exists

farmerValueProtected: Protects farmers from bad external data silently becoming their official farm record.
readinessClaimImpact: Failure blocks any AI-agent/runtime/world-model readiness claim for the affected capability.
